name: /standards-add: rejects an --id that already exists in STANDARDS-URLS.yaml or in plugin-shipped catalog
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf "- id: existing-id
  name: x
  url: https://x.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://other.com --id existing-id --tier 1 --applies-to typescript
